answer:
<think> I know that "60 Minutes" is a long-running American news program that has featured many notable journalists over the years. I also recall that in 2003, the US-led invasion of Iraq was underway, and Saddam Hussein was the President of Iraq at the time. Given the significance of the event, it's likely that a prominent journalist from "60 Minutes" would have been sent to cover the story. I'm trying to think of a well-known journalist from CBS who was active around that time... I'm not sure if it was Morley Safer or Mike Wallace, but I think it might have been Mike Wallace who interviewed Saddam Hussein. I'm going to look up the information to confirm... Ah, yes! I found it! Mike Wallace did indeed interview Saddam Hussein on February 24, 2003, for "60 Minutes".</think>
<answer> Mike Wallace </answer>
